## Summary

Adds a focused policy document for Quality Review Permission.

## Scope

Docs only. Defines:

- one account-level permission model
- no separate Revise Queue or Evaluation Report toggle
- status-only display on Evaluation and Revise pages
- no training-language framing on Revise Queue
- content-free telemetry by default
- admin/support prose access gated by the permission model

## Related

- #1024

## Validation

Docs-only PR. No runtime behavior changed.
